name: io.github.ElliotPadfield/hatchet-mcp
description: Observe and operate Hatchet workflows from an AI agent — runs, logs, trigger, cancel, replay.

environmentVariables.name: HATCHET_CLIENT_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Hatchet API token (a JWT). Encodes the server URL and tenant, so it is normally the only setting required.

environmentVariables.name: HATCHET_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL. Self-hosters can point this at any Hatchet instance.

environmentVariables.name: HATCHET_TENANT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Override the tenant id decoded from the token.
